start.npcText: Aye, you look like you've had a rough time. The dungeon'll do that to ya.

responses.text: What do you know about this place?
I made it out of the dungeon.

who_are_you.npcText: Name's Bron. Retired adventurer. Decided sitting by fires beats dying in dungeons.

about_place.npcText: This used to be a waystation for adventurers. Now it's just me and my drink.

survived_dungeon.npcText: You made it out? Ha! Wasn't sure you had it in ya. Most don't come back from that place. Here — take this. Old wayfinder's charm. Kept me alive more times than I care to count.

charm_given.npcText: Don't mention it. Just don't go dyin' on me now.

after_charm.npcText: Good. That charm'll keep the worst of it off ya. Trust me.
